film.title: Kick
film.overview: An adrenaline junkie walks away from a whirlwind romance and embraces a new life as a thief, though he soon finds himself pursued by veteran police officer and engaged in a turf war with a local gangster.

dialogues.dialogue: Where have they gone? You're an adult, you even wear such a long beard....but you still enter a temple with your shoes. You should be ashamed. What kind of a human being is he? He's completely the opposite.
You're very beautiful Is she really yours? You know, Shame. The health of India now lies in Mr. Gajra's hands. Very good. - It's nothing good.
dialogues.cause_raw: Being questioned about the authenticity of his relationship

dialogues.dialogue: Sorry. - See...I can hold my breath for 15 minutes, nothing happens to me. But when a needle p****s, it hurts. All of you should be ashamed. Such renowned people and such small talk. Come here.
That's fine, but where will you get that kind of money from? We'll start from here. I am proud of my son. Very proud. And his kick.
That's fine, but where will you get that kind of money from? We'll start from here. I am proud of my son. Very proud. And his kick. But he's been shot. - Dear! No.
